info.english_meaning: to swear to take oath to pledge to curse to abuse
info.hindI_arTa: SapaTa karanA sOgaMDa KAnA pratijYA karanA SrApa denA gAlI denA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: AkroSe Sapyate Sapyet Sapate SapatIti ca  upAlamBe SapervAkyAttaNi syAt Sapate padam ' (Slo. 132) iti devaH  ' AkroSe virudDAnuDyAyam ' iti kzIrasvAmI

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yadASrOzaM… saMSaptakAnnihatAnarjunena tadA nASaMsa vijayAya saMjaya' (BA0 Adi0 1189)..
